title: heliophila subulata subsp. longipila
intro: Heliophila subulata subsp. longipila, also known as the Long-leaved Heliophila, is a plant species that belongs to the Brassicaceae family. It is a flowering plant native to South Africa, known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's extracts have been traditionally used to provide relief from coughs and congestion, and its health benefits also include antioxidant and antimicrobial properties, which can help protect against infections and promote overall well-being. Heliophila subulata subsp. longipila is often prepared as a herbal tea or infusion, or used as a tincture in traditional medicine practices.
